TYRP1 variant - highly associated with European pigmentation traits.
OCA2 variant - informative for Western Eurasian ancestry.
Tag SNP for CCR5-delta32 deletion - exclusively found in populations with European descent.
TYR variant - deeply informative for European populations.
VDR variant - informative for European ancestry and localized vitamin D metabolism.
LOXL1 variant - anchor marker for European genetic components.
EUR/MENA Tie-Breaker - Highly specific to Northern and Central Europe, rare across the Mediterranean.
EUR/SAS Tie-Breaker - Anchors Western hunter-gatherer ancestry, drops sharply in South Asian populations.
EUR/EAS Tie-Breaker - Anchors Western Eurasian genetics against Siberian/Turkic gene flow.
EUR/AMR Tie-Breaker - European-specific marker that frequently appears in admixed Latino populations.
English Ancestry Marker - informative for Anglo-Saxon and Germanic components in Britain.
English Ancestry Marker - informative for English populations.
Irish Ancestry Marker - highly informative for Insular Celtic populations.
Irish Ancestry Marker - informative for Irish populations.
Scottish Ancestry Marker - informative for Scottish populations.
Scottish Highland Ancestry Marker - diagnostic for Gaelic-speaking populations of the Highlands.
Spanish Ancestry Marker - informative for Iberian populations.
Spanish Ancestry Marker - informative for Mediterranean European populations.
Slavic Ancestry Marker - informative for Balto-Slavic populations.
Polish Ancestry Marker - informative for West Slavic populations.
Russian Ancestry Marker - informative for East Slavic populations.
European Eye Color/Ancestry Marker - highly frequent in Northern European and Ashkenazi populations.
Ashkenazi Jewish Ancestry Marker - highly informative for Jewish populations of Eastern European descent.
European Regional Marker - informative for North-South gradient within Europe.
European Regional Marker - useful for distinguishing Northern and Southern European ancestry.
SLC24A4 Eye Color Marker - informative for European regional variation.
TYRP1 Hair Color Marker - shows significant variation across European populations.
HERC2 Eye Color Marker - highly informative for European ancestry and pigmentation traits.
Lactase Persistence Marker - highly prevalent in Northern and Central European populations (Germany/UK/Scandinavia).
Basque/Iberian Ancestry Marker - informative for populations of the Iberian Peninsula and Southern France.
Sardinian/Mediterranean Ancestry Marker - informative for Southern European and Mediterranean populations.
Central/Eastern European Ancestry Marker - informative for Ashkenazi Jewish and Central European populations.
Finnish/Baltic Ancestry Marker - informative for Northern and Eastern European populations.
Northwestern European Ancestry Marker - informative for populations of Germany, Benelux, and the British Isles.
Southern European Ancestry Marker - informative for Mediterranean and Balkan populations.
HERC2 Eye Color Marker - Primary determinant of blue/brown eye color in Europeans.
SLC24A5 Skin Pigmentation Marker - Nearly fixed in European populations, key for light skin.
SLC45A2 Skin Pigmentation Marker - Highly informative for European ancestry and light skin.
IRF4 Hair/Skin Marker - Associated with freckling, brown hair, and blue eyes in Northern Europeans.
MC1R Red Hair Marker - Highly specific to Northern and Western European populations.
KITLG Blond Hair Marker - Informative for Northern and Central European ancestry.
HFE Hemochromatosis Marker - Highest frequency in Northwestern Europe (Celtic/Germanic populations).
HLA-DQA1 Celiac Risk Marker - Informative for European and Mediterranean ancestry.
HERC2 Eye Color Marker - Complementary to rs12913832 for European pigmentation.
SLC24A4 Eye Color Marker - Informative for blue/green eye color in Europeans.
TTC39B Southern European Marker - Informative for Mediterranean populations.
LCT Tie-Breaker - Informative for European lactase persistence and ancestry.
MC1R Red Hair Variant (R151C) - Specific to Northern and Western European populations.
MC1R Red Hair Variant (D294H) - Informative for Northern European ancestry.
SLC45A2 Pigmentation Marker - Informative for European ancestry and light skin.
OCA2 Eye Color Marker - Informative for blue/green eye color in Europeans.
OCA2 Pigmentation Marker - Informative for European ancestry.
IRF4 Pigmentation Marker - Informative for Northern European ancestry.
SLC45A2 Pigmentation Marker - Strong European anchor marker.
MC1R Red Hair Variant (I155V) - Specific to Northern European populations.
LCT Lactase Persistence Marker - Informative for European ancestry.
HERC2 OCA2 variant - highly diagnostic for blue eye color in Northern European populations.
SLC24A5 'European' lightness variant - essential for identifying European admixture.
